hero_desc: Quality modded Minecraft servers where technology and magic become one. Stable gameplay, thoughtful builds, responsive community.
servers_title: Choose Your Path
server_hitech_desc: Endless energy, automation and high technology. Build massive factories and dominate with tech.
server_hardtech_desc: Real hardcore with GregTech. Complex crafting chains, thoughtful mechanics. Only for the brave.
server_technomagic_desc: Perfect combination of magic and electrical mechanisms. Two worlds united in one experience.
features_title: Why Choose Us?
feat_hardware_desc: Dedicated servers with high TPS. No lag, no compromises.
feat_economy_desc: Unique quests, fair trading, and rewarding gameplay.
feat_anticheat_desc: Advanced protection against cheaters. Fair play guaranteed.
feat_support_desc: Responsive moderation team ready to help anytime.
dl_title: Download Launcher
dl_desc: One click install. Our launcher automatically downloads Forge, mods, and configs. Just enter your nickname and play.
community_title: Join the Community
reviews_title: Trusted by thousands
review_1_text: One of the best Forge 1.12.2 modpacks I've ever played. IC2 + Thermal — stable, no lag, no broken recipes.
review_2_text: Admins actually reply in 5 minutes. They help, don't ban for newbie questions. Feels like home.
review_3_text: TPS stays at 19.8–20 rock solid. Chunks don't hang, mods just work. The hardware is genuinely good.
review_4_text: AE2 + automation here is an engineer's dream. You can build factories on a planetary scale.
review_5_text: The launcher is truly one-click. Downloaded, typed my name — playing. No Forge setup, no mods folder.
review_6_text: Perfect balance between mod count and performance. Not bloated, every mod has a purpose.
faq_title: Got questions?
faq_a1: Hit Download above, run the launcher, type your nickname and click Play. The launcher installs Forge and all mods automatically — no setup required.
faq_a2: Free. Donations exist but only unlock cosmetics (capes, effects) — strictly no pay-to-win.
faq_a3: Minimum: 8 GB RAM (4 GB allocated to the game), Java 8, Windows 10+. Any modern GPU works.
faq_q4: Can I play with a cracked account?
faq_a4: Yes. The launcher works with any account — premium Mojang or not. Server is cracked-friendly.
faq_a5: No regular wipes planned. Backups run every 6 hours — losing progress is almost impossible.
faq_q6: Found a bug or met a griefer?
faq_a6: Drop into Discord, channel #bug-reports, or DM a moderator. We respond fast — usually within an hour.
footer_text: Made with passion for Minecraft community
